summary: Fair‑quality recording of a decent show with a highlight on Crazy Fingers and an intriguing drum section.
review: The two reviewers give the performance a middling three‑star rating, describing the concert as "decent but not great" while calling Crazy Fingers a standout moment. The drum duo gets special mention for an unusual, almost electronic intro that makes the Drums/Space segment worth checking out, but no comments are made about the clarity or source of the audio.

ai_rating.rationale: Both reviews are neutral‑to‑average (3 stars) and focus mainly on the drums and a single song highlight; with only two brief comments, confidence is moderate.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Reviewers did not comment on soundboard vs. audience or specific clarity issues; no major audio problems were noted.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Described as decent but not great overall, with the drum segment standing out as an interesting, trippy interlude.

band_member_comments.Drums: Intro to Drums is long and features electro‑type textures; reviewers found it intriguing and a highlight of the show.
